name: IMA Studio — All-in-One AI Creation
tagline: Image, video, music, TTS in one — SeeDream, Midjourney, Nano Banana, Veo, Sora, Kling, Wan, Pixverse, Suno, DouBao, seed-tts. All-in-one AI creation.
description: All-in-One AI creation via IMA Open API: image, video, music, and TTS generation with runtime model discovery. Supports text_to_image, image_to_image, text_to_video, image_to_video, first_last_frame_to_video, reference_image_to_video, text_to_music, and text_to_speech. Requires IMA_API_KEY. Works standalone; when ima-knowledge-ai is installed, optional reference reads may be used for workflow and consistency guidance.
credentialNotice: The IMA API key is required at runtime (--api-key or IMA_API_KEY). It is always sent to api.imastudio.com for product/task APIs. It is sent to imapi.liveme.com only for local image uploads in image/video tasks. Obtain keys at https://imastudio.com. Use a scoped or test key if concerned about credential exposure.
optionalDependencyNote: When ima-knowledge-ai is installed, this skill may optionally read ~/.openclaw/skills/ima-knowledge-ai/references/* for workflow decomposition, visual-consistency, and mode-selection guidance. The skill works standalone without those reads.

requires.credentialNote: IMA_API_KEY is required at runtime. It is sent to api.imastudio.com and, for local image uploads, to imapi.liveme.com.

localPaths.purpose: Preferences (model defaults) and generation logs; logs auto-deleted after 7 days. User can delete anytime.

persistence.retention: Logs are auto-cleaned after 7 days; preferences remain until user deletes them.

use_cases: Image, video, music, TTS in one entry
Multimodal content creation and workflow orchestration
Character consistency across image and video
key_features: SeeDream, Midjourney, Nano Banana, Wan, Kling, Veo, Sora, Suno, DouBao
Runtime model discovery and smart defaults
Alternative to multiple skills (ai-image + ai-video + suno + tts)
